перефразируй
The 43 Cutest Pixie Bob Haircut Ideas Ever
43 of the most adorable Pixie Bob haircut ideas you'll ever see

перефразируй
Apixie bob haircut is a women’s short haircut whose length ranges between a pixie and a bob (between ear-length and neck-length). For those edgy gals who don’t mind a crop, this modish cut should be a definite go!

Though short, you’ll be surprised how versatile this hairstyle is! It can go from one-length to angled, choppy and shaggy to sleek, with a full front fringe or lovely side bangs, or matched with a chic fashion color.

Ladies with the best pixies on television and who are for the cropped hair movement include Emilia Clarke, Zendaya, Mia Farrow, and Shailene Woodley. But all thanks go to the OG pixie bob queen  – Audrey Hepburn, who rocked the look with her natural locks!

Another good news is that with short hair comes less maintenance! Although if you fall too deep in love with the look, a trim visit is due monthly to keep the length at bay.

Still having second thoughts? Make that hesitation go away when you take a look at these up-to-date examples of pixie bob haircut ideas below!

The Pixie Bob haircut is a stylish short hairstyle for women that falls between a pixie and a bob, typically ranging from ear-length to neck-length. This trendy cut is perfect for daring women who don't mind going for a shorter style.

Despite its short length, the Pixie Bob haircut is surprisingly versatile, with options ranging from one-length to angled, choppy or sleek, and can be styled with a full front fringe or side bangs, or even paired with a trendy fashion color.

Celebrities who have rocked the Pixie Bob haircut include Emilia Clarke, Zendaya, Mia Farrow, and Shailene Woodley, with Audrey Hepburn being the original Pixie Bob queen who popularized the look with her natural locks.

One of the benefits of having short hair is the low maintenance it requires, though regular trims are recommended to keep the style looking fresh.

If you're still unsure about trying the Pixie Bob haircut, take a look at the latest examples below to help you make your decision.

перефразируй
A pixie bob haircut looks best on older women and can be cut to require less maintenance. You only need some light blow dry styling using a flat brush and the round of the head to create volume and movement. Once dry, use some paste or pomade to add piece-y ness /texture. This cut can be done symmetrically or asymmetrically for more flair.

The pixie bob haircut is most flattering on mature women and can be customized to be low-maintenance. To style, simply blow dry lightly using a flat brush to create volume and movement around the head. After drying, apply some paste or pomade for added texture and a piece-y look. This haircut can be done with a symmetrical or asymmetrical finish for a touch of flair.

перефразируй
A messy pixie bob is the best hairstyle if you want something short yet soft. Having long sides adds a feminine touch.
For a soft, short hairstyle with a touch of femininity, consider a tousled pixie bob with longer side sections.

перефразируй
This pixie is bold yet feminine. This is a short asymmetrical bob cut with disconnection. The sides and back are done with scissors and combover that is very tight and clean to the head. The top portion is done by point cutting at a diagonal, directing each section to the previous. The asymmetrical pixie bob style is versatile and can be worn on either side. On lazy days, she can pull the fringe back in a cute small braid or with bobby pins. What I love about this look is the confidence it gives her. She feels beautiful and strong.

Make sure you are committed to this style. Most people have the misconception that short hair is easier. That’s usually not the case. It requires more styling, investment in good styling products, and more frequent visits to the salon. As far as products go, my go-to for short hair is Kengo Feather from Shu Uemura. It’s a great texture cream that provides excellent hold without a sticky or greasy feeling

This bold yet feminine pixie hairstyle features a short asymmetrical bob cut with disconnection. The sides and back are carefully cut with scissors and the combover is neat and close to the head. The top section is point-cut diagonally, blending each section into the previous one. This versatile asymmetrical pixie bob can be styled to either side and on casual days, the fringe can be styled into a cute braid or pinned back with bobby pins. The confidence and beauty this look brings to the wearer is what makes it special.

Before opting for this style, make sure you are willing to commit to it. Short hair requires more styling, good quality products, and regular salon visits. One highly recommended product for short hair is the Kengo Feather from Shu Uemura, a texture cream that provides a strong hold without feeling sticky or greasy.

перефразируй
Looking to switch up your short hair game? Consider a champagne blonde pixie bob cut which is a style that exudes confidence. This cut is perfect for those who want something short and chic but want to maintain some length. The blonde hue adds a touch of glamour, while the choppy layers provide volume and movement. To style, start with damp hair, and don’t forget to apply a volumizing mousse to the roots for added lift. Then, blow dry using a round brush to shape the bob and slightly curl the ends. Finish off with a spritz of hairspray to keep the style in place all day.

If you're looking to update your short hair look, why not try a champagne blonde pixie bob cut for a confident and stylish change? This haircut is perfect for those seeking a short and chic style with a bit of length. The blonde color adds a hint of glamour, while the textured layers give the hair volume and movement. To achieve this look, start with damp hair and apply a volumizing mousse to the roots for extra lift. Use a round brush to blow dry the hair, shaping the bob and giving the ends a slight curl. Finish off with a spritz of hairspray to ensure the style stays in place throughout the day.

перефразируй
A chocolate pixie bob with choppy layers is a cool cut that will get you tons of compliments. To get this style, ask for a short bob with lots of layers and texture through the length. Skip adding a bang if you want the shape to be more dramatic around the face. Invest in a great blow dryer and a medium round brush to help you create a fluffy and piece-y style. Try Redken Shine Flash Glass on your chocolate pixie bob for an extremely shiny finish.

For a chic and stylish look that is sure to garner compliments, opt for a chocolate-hued pixie bob with choppy layers. Request a short bob with plenty of textured layers throughout the length to achieve this style. For a more dramatic shape around the face, consider skipping the addition of a bang. Invest in a high-quality blow dryer and a medium round brush to help create a fluffy, piece-y hairstyle. For an extra shiny finish on your chocolate pixie bob, try using Redken Shine Flash Glass.

перефразируй
An auburn bixie with long layers is a great way to keep your hair long in the front, but short in the back. This will make your hair appear fuller yet still have some length to it. A bixie haircut is one of the most sought-after hairstyles right now because it offers the fullness a pixie gives you and the versatility of a bob. If you can, book your haircut appointment every 3-4 weeks to maintain this short, skin-tight length at the nape of your neck.

Opting for an auburn bixie with lengthy layers is an excellent method to keep the front of your hair long while maintaining a shorter length in the back. This technique creates the illusion of fuller hair while still preserving some length. The bixie haircut is currently highly desirable as it combines the volume of a pixie cut with the versatility of a bob. For maintenance, it is recommended to schedule a haircut appointment every 3-4 weeks to ensure that the short, close-to-skin length at the nape of your neck is maintained.

перефразируй
A long pixie bob with blonde balayage is a classy chic style that everyone will notice! Doing some heavier balayage pieces through your hair will give you beautiful dimension. I suggest styling your hair with some waves to make the blonde stand out.

A sleek and sophisticated look that is sure to turn heads is achieved with a long pixie bob featuring blonde balayage. Incorporating some bolder balayage highlights throughout your hair will add stunning depth and dimension. To enhance the blonde hues, I recommend styling your hair with soft waves to make the color pop.

перефразируй
Consider a lovely tapered bixie with dark roots. A mixture of a bob and a pixie, a bixie is a perfect length to keep you looking soft. The ears are kept covered and they can be tucked behind for versatility. If you like the rounded back, one of the best ways to achieve this is to use a small round brush in that area. A bixie is s short classy cut that is here to stay.

Think about trying a charming tapered bixie with roots in a dark shade. Combining elements of both a bob and a pixie, the bixie haircut offers a flattering length that maintains a soft look. With the ears covered and able to be styled tucked behind, this haircut provides versatility. To achieve a rounded back shape, using a small round brush in that specific area is highly effective. The bixie is a stylish, short haircut that is a timeless choice.

перефразируй
A brown and blonde bixie is the perfect contrasting hair color for women who can’t decide between having brown or blonde tones in their hair. Keeping brown at your root area will not only create depth but also make it a much easier grow-out if you have naturally brown hair. Not all blonde hair has to be high maintenance. Just ask your stylist for a balayage if you want blended blonde highlights.

For those who struggle to choose between brown and blonde hair colors, a bixie with both shades is an ideal compromise. By incorporating brown at the roots, you can achieve depth while also facilitating a smoother transition as your hair grows out, especially if you have natural brown hair. Blonde hair doesn't always have to be high maintenance—consider opting for a balayage technique to achieve a seamless blend of blonde highlights with minimal upkeep.

перефразируй
Blonde pixie bobs with layers are always a classic look! Ask your stylist to add some disconnected layering to add more texture and movement. A pixie bob will always be easy to style using a blow dryer and flat brush against the round of the head. You can round brush the top and front if more volume is needed. Always finish with a texture cream or spray to add definition.

Blonde pixie bobs with layered cuts are a timeless choice! To enhance texture and movement, request disconnected layers from your stylist. Styling a pixie bob is simple using a blow dryer and flat brush, focusing on the round shape of your head. For added volume, use a round brush on the top and front sections. Complete the look with a texture cream or spray for definition.
